# Completion.ResolveResultType method

Resolves the `resultType` of a received `completion/complete` result, treating an absent (or non-string) value as `"complete"`. (§19.4, R-19.4-l)

```csharp
public static string ResolveResultType(JsonObject result)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| result | The raw result object received on the wire. |

## Return Value

The resolved result type.
